information.subtitle: Find useful travel guidance and local support resources.
information.tip_text: Carry water, respect local rhythms and ask before photographing people.
information.support_text: Use the official tourism desks and follow community recommendations.
information.transport_text: Walk the historic center, take a boat ride or choose a local tuk-tuk.
information.quick_tip1: Stay hydrated and protect yourself from the sun.
information.quick_tip2: Respect local schedules and ask permission before taking photos.
information.quick_tip3: Support small businesses and buy directly from artisans.

impact.subtitle: Learn how your visit helps communities and heritage projects.
impact.section1_text: Local artisans, guides and small businesses are at the heart of the island experience.
impact.section2_text: Choose sober consumption and avoid single-use plastics during your visit.
impact.section3_text: Support preservation by following area guidance and sharing local stories.
impact.section4_text: Your stay supports education, craft workshops and heritage restoration.
impact.support_subtitle: Support community projects symbolically to unlock weekly rewards.

experiences.subtitle: Local encounters, workshops and stories from the island community.
experiences.card1_text: Meet artisans, storytellers and community hosts.
experiences.card2_text: Taste traditional cuisine in historic markets and family kitchens.
experiences.card3_text: Choose trips that support both heritage and the environment.
experiences.card4_text: Build your route with unique stops and local recommendations.

culture.subtitle: Heritage routes, historic landmarks and cultural rituals to explore.
culture.section1_text: Discover monuments and colonial architecture with deep stories.
culture.section2_text: Experience the rituals, music and everyday culture of the island.
culture.highlight_subtitle: The best places to begin your heritage route.
culture.timeline_subtitle: Milestones in the Island's history, from Swahili trading post to World Heritage.

favourites.summary_next_suggestion: Need inspiration? Explore recommended local spots.

planner.season_rainy: Rainy season (November-March): plan transfers with extra time.
